_comment: cave-home-core panels — Phase 1. Real Grafana JSON lands here once observability M3 is live. Planned panels: events fired per second (by event_type), state_changed event rate, state machine entity count (by domain), event bus listener count (current + watermark), listen_once → fire latency p50/p95/p99, attribute-only vs value-change ratio (last_changed carry-forward effectiveness), per-entity state churn (top-10 noisy entities), context propagation depth histogram.
